prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `50f325b5`.
codex_response:
Implemented `50f325b5` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: use the full input `8` pattern as the template, find all rotated/reflected copies drawn in `3`, keep non-overlapping matches in reading order, and recolor those matched `3` cells to `8`.

`arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` was useful as a starting hint, but I corrected it in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_50f325b5/notes.md): reflections are allowed, and overlapping candidate matches must be resolved greedily in reading order. The generator matches the task family by placing one explicit `8` template, 1-3 transformed `3` targets, then adding dense safe clutter from the same color palette while checking that no unintended matches appear. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`, artifacts built successfully, and [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/50f325b5/previews/preview_01.png) was checked visually.
